modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in bullet points and use a warm and approachable tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Difficulty adjusting margins in Google Docs.

full_description_text:  
- I was trying to change the margins in my Google Docs document, but I couldn't figure it out.  
- It seems like there should be a way to do this, but I just can't find the right settings.  
- I really need to make my document look nice, and the margins are all off right now.
short_description: Difficulty adjusting margins in Google Docs.
description:
- I was trying to change the margins in my Google Docs document, but I couldn't figure it out.

- I really need to make my document look nice, and the margins are all off right now.
